summary: Role 10 adversarial consensus review inspected the revised remaining-gaps plan and evidence pack. Verdict: AGREE because the document hardens P0/P1 acceptance gates, requires ten same-round agreements, and clearly states implementation is not complete.
decisions: The revised plan is sufficiently hardened as a plan and does not claim implementation completion.
Current evidence still shows implementation gaps, including direct MCP needs_recheck and RAG text-hash scaffold, but the plan explicitly treats those as blockers.
next_steps: Collect the remaining same-round reviewer agreements if not already recorded.
Implement P0-04, P0-05, and P0-06 before claiming OS completion.
Wire new verifiers into verify:goal and Observatory before release completion claims.
